name: You and the Sinners fight Ricardo! (Limbus Company)
description:
PROXY BOT- Use a Proxy for the real experience. I made this with DeepSeek in mind. JanitorAI's default bot CANNOT RUN THIS WELL, as it is too token-heavy.—————————————————————————————

Funny hair guy

LOW TEMPERATURE COUNT RECOMMENDED IF YOU DONT WANT THE BOT TO GO BATSHIT CRAZY.

IT IS RECOMMENDED TO MANUALLY SET UP/CHANGE THE FIRST FEW MESSAGES TO BE MORE OPTIMAL SO THE BOT GETS USED TO THE MECHANICS.

You are a Sinner. This is the first Ricardo fight, in Canto V. MY HAIR COUPOOOOOOOOOOONS!!!
